title: Cabinmod 4
description: A modpack made for friends, primarily centered around the mods Cobblemon and Create, with a dash of Exploration, Magic, and Tech.
body:
This pack is for a private server, and will only be maintained for said server.

This mod includes:

Artifacts, Baubles, and Trinkets! Optimization mods like Nvidium, Sodium, and Krypton! (Disable Nvidium if not on a Nvidia GPU). Building mods such as Chipped, Clutter, Cluttered and a whole lot more. Cobblemon and many add-ons such as Mega Evolutions, Breeding, and Mounting. Graphical Mods like Continuity, Iris, Wakes, and Effective. Create mods and many add-ons such as Crafts & Additions, Estrogen (yes really), and Interiors. Farmer's Delight and many add-ons like Expanded Delight, End and Nethers Delight, and more Hephaestus and Mythic Metals are Tinkerer's Construct standins. Magic, Tech and Storage mods like AE2, Tom's Simple Storage, Spectrum, and Botania. To round things out, we've also got Oh the Biomes we've gone, Regions Unexplored, Better End, and many structure mods to add Exploration into the mix.

There will definitely be patches, always expect them. You'll hear about it over in the discord.
